mapper.select: /** UsptStdrIoeSetupDao.selectViewList */ select uwi.wct_ioe_id , uwi.wct_ioe_nm , case when usis.stdr_bsns_cd is null then false else true end as is_checked , #{stdrBsnsCd} as stdr_bsns_cd from uspt_wct_ioe uwi left outer join uspt_stdr_ioe_setup usis on usis.wct_ioe_id = uwi.wct_ioe_id and usis.stdr_bsns_cd = #{stdrBsnsCd}

/** UsptStdrIoeSetupDao.selectTaxitmList */ select uwt.wct_taxitm_id , uwt.wct_taxitm_nm , case when usts.stdr_bsns_cd is null then false else true end as is_checked from uspt_wct_taxitm uwt left outer join uspt_stdr_taxitm_setup usts on usts.wct_taxitm_id = uwt.wct_taxitm_id and usts.stdr_bsns_cd = #{stdrBsnsCd} where uwt.wct_ioe_id = #{wctIoeId} order by uwt.wct_ioe_id
/** UsptStdrIoeSetupDao.selectList */ select stdr_bsns_cd , wct_ioe_id from uspt_stdr_ioe_setup where stdr_bsns_cd = #{stdrBsnsCd}
